stem: The area A, in square centimeters, of a rectangular cutting board can be represented by the expression w(w + 9), where w is the width, in centimeters, of the cutting board. Which expression represents the length, in centimeters, of the cutting board?
explanation: Area of a rectangle is length times width. Since the area is written as w(w + 9) with w being the width, the remaining factor (w + 9) must be the length.
